column1: BG 1.B#ॐ श्री परमात्मने नमः\nअथ प्रथमोऽध्यायः अर्जुन विषाद योगः#om sri paramatmane namaha\natha prathamo dhyayaha arjuna vishada yogaha#Salutations to the most auspicious divine in all. Henceforth
column2: the first chapter named Arjuna Vishada Yoga#om sri paramatmane—the most auspicious divine in all; namaha—salutations; atha—henceforth; prathamo dhyayaha—first chapter; arjuna vishada yogaha—Yoga of Arjuna's grief#https://lotsgj.github.io/gita/data/audio/BG-1/chant/BG-1.B.mp3

column1:
BG 1.1#धृतराष्ट्र उवाच |
धर्मक्षेत्रे कुरुक्षेत्रे समवेता युयुत्सवः |
मामकाः पाण्डवाश्चैव किमकुर्वत सञ्जय ||1||#dhṛitarāśhtra uvācha
dharma-kṣhetre kuru-kṣhetre samavetā yuyutsavaḥ
māmakāḥ pāṇḍavāśhchaiva kimakurvata sañjaya#Dhritarashtra said: O Sanjay
column2: after gathering on the holy field of Kurukshetra
column4: what did my sons and the sons of Pandu do?#dhṛitarāśhtraḥ uvācha—Dhritarashtra said; dharma-kṣhetre—the land of dharma; kuru-kṣhetre—at Kurukshetra; samavetāḥ—having gathered; yuyutsavaḥ—desiring to fight; māmakāḥ—my sons; pāṇḍavāḥ—the sons of Pandu; cha—and; eva—certainly; kim—what; akurvata—did they do; sañjaya—Sanjay#https://lotsgj.github.io/gita/data/audio/BG-1/chant/BG-1.1.mp3
